heading: Applicability of administrative procedure provisions
label: 524 Applicability of administrative procedure provisions
text: In the administration of this Act, hearings and other procedures shall be exempted from the provisions of subchapter II of chapter 5, and chapter 7, of title 5, except as to the requirements of .section 552 of title 5
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , which enacted this section and amended sections 511, 516, and 523 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act July 16, 1952, ch. 88966 Stat. 732
